mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name,u.smartRealName,u.isBindSmart, u.company,u.project,a.dict_label areaName,u.area,u.property,u.user_type,u.openid, u.email, u.avatar, u.phone, u.password, u.sex, u.status,u.online,u.is_messages, u.is_remind,u.remind_url,u.remark_name,u.remark_info,u.custom_status,u.custom_reply, u.is_delete, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_user, u.create_time, u.remark, d.dept_id, d.p_id, d.dept_name, d.is_delete as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.is_delete as role_status,u.order_status from sys_user u left join sys_department d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_role_user ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id left join (select dict_label,dict_value from sys_dict_data where dict_type = 'sys_area') a on a.dict_value = u.area
mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.user_type, u.nick_name,u.order_status,u.smartRealName,u.isBindSmart, u.user_name, u.phone,u.avatar, u.sex,a.dict_label areaName,u.area,u.company,u.project, u.status, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_user,dp.name property, u.is_remind,u.remind_url,u.remark_name,u.remark_info,u.custom_status,u.custom_reply, u.create_time, u.remark,r.role_name roleName,u.online,u.is_messages from sys_user u left join (select dict_label,dict_value from sys_dict_data where dict_type = 'sys_area') a on a.dict_value = u.area left join sys_role_user ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id left join (select id,name from sys_dict_label where type = 2) dp on dp.id = u.property ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name,u.smartRealName,u.isBindSmart, u.company,u.project,a.dict_label areaName,u.area,u.property,u.user_type, u.email, u.avatar, u.phone, u.password, u.sex, u.status,u.online, u.is_delete, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_user, u.create_time, u.remark, u.is_remind,u.remind_url,u.remark_name,u.remark_info,u.custom_status,u.custom_reply, d.dept_id, d.p_id, d.dept_name, d.is_delete as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.is_delete as role_status,u.order_status from sys_user u left join sys_department d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_role_user ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id left join (select dict_label,dict_value from sys_dict_data where dict_type = 'sys_area') a on a.dict_value = u.area where u.phone = #{phone}
select count(1) from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} limit 1
select user_id, phone from sys_user where phone = #{phone} limit 1
select user_id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_name, nick_name, email, avatar, phone, sex, password, status, create_user, remark, user_type, company, project, area, property, openid, is_remind, remind_url, create_time )values( #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{remark}, #{userType}, #{company}, #{project}, #{area}, #{property}, #{openid}, #{isRemind}, #{remindUrl}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update sys_user set code = #{code} where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set status = #{status} where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set is_messages = #{isMessages} where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set order_status = #{orderStatus} where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set avatar = #{avatar} where user_name = #{userName}
update sys_user set password = #{password} where user_name = #{userName}
update sys_user set online = #{online} where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set phone = #{phone} where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_user where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select:
select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phone, u.is_remind,u.remind_url,u.remark_name,u.remark_info, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_role_user ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.is_delete = 0 and (r.role_id != #{roleId} or r.role_id IS NULL) and u.user_id not in (select u.user_id from sys_user u inner join sys_role_user ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id and ur.role_id = #{roleId})
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
select user_id,user_name,nick_name from sys_user where online = 1 and user_name != #{userName} and area = #{area} and user_type = '00'
